_comment: Veztra Playwright Test Suite — Edit this file to configure your test run

testUser._comment: Registered account credentials for auth & order-history tests (leave blank to skip those tests)

guestCheckout._comment: Billing details used for the guest-checkout end-to-end test

products._comment: List of product page URLs to run product-detail tests against. Leave 'urls' as [] to auto-scrape from the shop page (requires 'scrapeProductsFromShop: true').

mobileViewport._comment: Viewport used for all mobile-view tests

retries._comment: Number of retries on flaky tests (CI typically uses 2)
